sections.paragraph:
once גָּלֻת Oba 1:20 (with Kametz impure), f. [root גָּלָה.]

(1) a carrying away, exile, 2Ki 25:27 Jer 52:31 Eze 1:2 33:21 .

(2) collect. those who are carried away, exiles. גָּלוּת יְהוּדָה “the exiles of Judah,” Jer 24:5 28:4 29:22 40:1 גָּלוּת יְהֹוָה used of Israel living in exile, Isa 45:13.

גלות

emph. גָּלוּתָא f., Ch. exile, בְּנֵי גָלוּתָא exiles; Dan 2:25 5:13 Ezr 6:16. Syr. ܓܳܠܘܽܬܐܳ.
